mapper.sql: SELECT ANIMAL_ID animalId , ANIMAL_NAME animalName , SPECIES_NAME speciesId , ZONE_NAME zoneId , NVL(KEEPER_NAME, '미배정') keeperId , GENDER gender , WEIGHT_KG weightKg FROM ANIMAL LEFT JOIN SPECIES USING(SPECIES_ID) LEFT JOIN ZONE USING(ZONE_ID) LEFT JOIN KEEPER USING(KEEPER_ID)
mapper.select: SELECT ANIMAL_ID , ANIMAL_NAME , SPECIES_ID , ZONE_ID , KEEPER_ID , GENDER , WEIGHT_KG , BIRTH_DATE , ARRIVAL_DATE FROM ANIMAL WHERE ANIMAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID DESC
